name: Headless UI Vue
description: Completely unstyled, fully accessible UI components for Vue, designed to integrate beautifully with Tailwind CSS

description.value: Completely unstyled, fully accessible UI components for Vue, designed to integrate beautifully with Tailwind CSS

active-maintenance.comment: Vue version not actively maintained; last release v1.7.22 on May 8, 2024; React version receives active development while Vue version has not had substantial updates in 2.5+ years

initial-release.comment: First announced October 2020 by Tailwind Labs

github-stars.comment: 28.2k stars as of December 2025; shared repository with React version

styling-approach.comment: Completely unstyled primitives designed to be styled with Tailwind CSS; also works with any CSS approach

component-model.comment: Headless component library providing behavior and accessibility without any visual styles

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (95.4% of codebase); full type definitions included

ssr-compatible.comment: SSR compatible with Nuxt via nuxt-headlessui module; requires provideHeadlessUseId for Vue <3.5 to avoid hydration mismatches

rsc-compatible.comment: Not applicable - Vue library, RSC is React-specific

design-system.comment: Headless library with no design system; intended for use with Tailwind CSS or custom styles

dark-mode.comment: No built-in dark mode support; developers implement via Tailwind dark mode or custom CSS

theming-system.comment: No theming system - unstyled components allow complete custom theming

css-variables.comment: No built-in CSS variables; developers implement their own styling approach

design-tokens.comment: No design tokens provided - headless library

rtl-support.comment: No explicit RTL support documented; developers handle RTL via CSS

component-count.comment: 16 components: Menu, Dialog, Disclosure, Popover, Tabs, Transition, Combobox, Listbox, RadioGroup, Switch, Button, Checkbox, Fieldset, Input, Select, Textarea

text-input.comment: Input component available in v1 Vue documentation

select.comment: Listbox component provides custom select functionality with accessibility

multi-select.comment: Listbox supports multiple prop for multi-selection

combobox.comment: Combobox with autocomplete, filtering, single/multiple selection, object binding, and nullable values

radio.comment: RadioGroup component for radio button groups with object binding support

switch-toggle.comment: Switch component with same semantics and keyboard navigation as native checkbox

tag-input.comment: No tag input component; Combobox with multiple can be used for similar functionality

input-groups.comment: No input groups component; Fieldset available for grouping form elements

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated input with dropdown; can be composed with Combobox

button-groups.comment: No button groups or toggle group component

split-button.comment: No split button component; can be composed with Menu

list-view.comment: No dedicated list view; Listbox handles selectable lists

card.comment: No card component - layout/presentation beyond scope

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog component with focus trapping, aria management, and Portal rendering

drawer-sheet.comment: No drawer component; Dialog can be styled as drawer

popover.comment: Popover with automatic positioning, PopoverGroup for related popovers

tooltip.comment: No tooltip component; can be composed with Popover

dropdown-menu.comment: Menu component with full keyboard navigation and ARIA compliance

context-menu.comment: No right-click context menu; Menu can be adapted

command-palette.comment: No command palette; can be composed with Dialog and Combobox

tabs.comment: TabGroup with keyboard navigation, manual activation mode, and vertical orientation

vertical-tabs.comment: Tabs support vertical orientation via vertical prop

navigation-menu.comment: No dedicated navigation menu; Popover and Menu can be used

collapsible.comment: Disclosure component for expandable/collapsible content, suitable for accordions

form-libraries.comment: No official form library bindings; works with any via v-model and name prop for HTML form submission

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in Transition component for coordinating animations; also works with Vue's native transition

icon-libraries.comment: Documentation uses Heroicons (also by Tailwind Labs); compatible with any icon library

date-libraries.comment: No date picker means no date library integration

aria-compliant.comment: All relevant ARIA attributes automatically managed; follows WAI-ARIA Menu Button and other specs

keyboard-navigation.comment: Comprehensive keyboard support: arrow keys, Home/End, type-ahead, Enter/Space activation, Escape to close

screen-reader-tested.comment: Described as 'fully accessible'; Dialog hides rest of UI from screen readers when open

focus-management.comment: Focus trapping in Dialog, focus restoration on close, initialFocus prop for custom focus target

wcag-level.comment: No specific WCAG level documented; follows WAI-ARIA patterns

accessibility-rating.comment: Excellent - core focus of library is accessibility; automatic ARIA management, keyboard navigation, focus trapping, screen reader support

bundle-size-full.comment: Approximately 19 KB minified + gzipped for full package (estimated based on v1.7.x)

tree-shakeable.comment: ES modules support tree-shaking; import only components you need

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for component behavior and accessibility

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be imported individually and lazy-loaded

documentation-quality.comment: Good - comprehensive examples, API reference, keyboard navigation docs, slot props documentation; some gaps in advanced use cases

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes live component examples with code snippets

storybook.comment: No official public Storybook; examples in repository playgrounds

figma-kit.comment: No official Figma kit; community-created alternatives exist (Headless Design System Starter on Figma Community)

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool; components installed via npm

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Approximately 300k weekly downloads (estimated based on npm registry data)

commercial-support.comment: No commercial support tier; Tailwind Labs focuses commercial offerings on Tailwind UI/Plus

style-override.comment: Styling via class attributes; data-headlessui-state attributes for state-based styling; @headlessui/tailwindcss plugin provides ui-* modifiers

compound-components.comment: Extensive compound component pattern (e.g., Menu, MenuButton, MenuItems, MenuItem)

render-props.comment: Uses Vue slots with slot props rather than render props pattern

slots.comment: Slot props expose component state (open, active, selected, disabled) for conditional rendering

unstyled-mode.comment: Entirely unstyled by default - headless component library
